name: QA 1181
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1181

Exercise the BCC PMDA kprobe hits module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform debian10 reproduce
